calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Hong Hao Wang, Appellant/Defendant, assisted by Mandarin Interperter Edmond Lui;
Dorothy Young of Wong & Associates, Telephone (510) 451-2124, Counsel for Appellant/Defendant Hong Hao Wang;
Jia Lian Xue, Respondent/Plaintiff, appearing on his own behalf;
Yuxiu Fu, Witness for Respondent/Plaintiff;
Kevin Chen, Witness for Respondent/Plaintiff;

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.

Jia Lian Xue, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on his own behalf.
Kevin Chen, Witness for Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on behalf of Respondent.
Yuxiu Fu, Witness for Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on behalf of Respondent.

Jia Lian Xue provides a signed receipt showing payment of deposit to the Court and Appellant for review. Receipt is returned to respondent.

Dorothy Young, testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant, Hong Hao Wang who is assisted by Edmond Lui, Mandarin Interperter.
Hong Hao Wang, Appellant/Defendant testifies on his own behalf assisted by Mandarin Interperter Edmond Lui.

Appellant presents a written contract between Kevin Chen, Witness for respondent, Jia Lian Xue and Hong Hao Wang, Appellant/Defendant, to the Court for review. (contract is in chinese accompanied by an english translated version). Contract returned to Hong Hao Wang, Appellant/Defendant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: David Fleisig, Clerk: William Trupek, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Judgment Entered
